title: nothorhipsalis houlletiana
intro: Nothorhipsalis houlletiana, commonly known as the Living Rock, is a type of cactus that belongs to the Hylocereeae subfamily. It is known for its unique, tree-like appearance and is native to the tropical forests of Central and South America. The health benefits of Nothorhipsalis houlletiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve sleep quality, and exhibit antimicrobial properties, making it a valuable asset for promoting relaxation and overall well-being. The bioactive constituents present in this plant include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its therapeutic actions, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and immune-modulating effects.

side_effects: Nothorhipsalis houlletiana can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, or respiratory problems due to its potential to release allergenic particles into the air when disturbed. Ingesting the plant's sap or leaves can cause nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, as well as interact with medications or exacerbate pre-existing health conditions.
